Description: Spatial transformations (Affine and SyN Warp) generated via ANTs to register the study-specific 'normative' population template to the standard SIGMA Wistar rat brain template.(v1.2.1)
TargetTemplateCitation: Barriere, D. A., et al. (2019). The SIGMA rat brain templates and atlases from neonatal to geriatric. Nature communications, 10(1), 5699.
Note: The SIGMA reference template is not included in this dataset to respect the original authors' distribution. Please download it directly from the provided URL to apply these transformations.
